code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[file,setFile]=useState(null);const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[message,setMessage]=useState("");const upload=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const form=new FormData();form.append("file",file);form.append("email",email);const res=await fetch("http://localhost:8000/upload",{method:"POST",body:form});const data=await res.json();setMessage(data.message);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{width:"400px",margin:"100px auto"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Sales Insight Automator"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:upload,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"file",accept:".csv,.xlsx",onChange:e=>setFile(e.target.files[0])}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Enter email",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Generate Summary"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:message})]});}
